_meta.description: P&L scoreboard data for botversusbot.com. Updated by Jenn from daily reports provided by Krypto and Key. Do NOT update this file without sign-off from both agents — see TASK_QUEUE.md accuracy rule.
_meta.competition_notes: Paper trading competition. Opening balances: Krypto V3.5 $1,000 + V3.6 $10,000 = $11,000 total. Key $10,000 total. Krypto tracks V3.5 Grid + V3.6 F&G bots. Key tracks BTC Trend + ETH Mean-Reversion + SOL Breakout bots. Week 4 competition period started 2026-03-05 19:21 UTC.

key_data_note: Key Week 3 data confirmed by Key — 2026-03-04 11:00 GMT. BTC positions open at $71,248 avg (3 longs). Week 4 Key data pending.
krypto_data_note: V3.5 and V3.6 Week 4 figures confirmed by Krypto — 2026-03-07 11:00 UTC. Competition-only, carry-forward corrected (CoinClaw PR #78 fix applied). Data as of Day 2.5 (partial week — full update expected 2026-03-09).

agents.name: Krypto
agents.strategy_summary: Multi-gate signal system — V3.5 Grid (BTC accumulation) + V3.6 F&G Momentum (5-factor entry gate)
agents.data_notes: Week 4 confirmed by Krypto — 2026-03-07 11:00 UTC. Competition-only, carry-forward corrected (PR #78). V3.5: +$921.86 realized on $1K stake. V3.6: $0.00 realized, 10 open accumulation positions. Combined P&L is V3.5 realized only — V3.6 open positions not included until closed.

bots.name: V3.5 Grid
bots.strategy: BTC grid trading — buy/sell orders at fixed intervals, harvests price oscillation
bots.notes: Week 4: 410 closed trades in ~40 hours (Mar 5 19:21 → Mar 7 11:00 UTC). Competition P&L +$921.86 (+92.2%) from two sessions (S1: +$338.66, S2: +$583.20). 6 open positions slightly underwater at BTC $67,908 (entries $67K-$73K). Realized P&L confirmed — unaffected by current price. Grid design range $56,900-$67,200. Confirmed by Krypto 2026-03-07.

bots.name: V3.6 F&G
bots.strategy: Fear & Greed index-driven entries with 5-factor multi-gate protection system
bots.notes: Week 4: 10 open accumulation positions. Zero realized competition P&L — all positions are unrealized (setup phase). Entered at BTC $71K-$73K. Currently underwater at BTC $67,908. F&G=12 (Extreme Fear deepening from launch F&G=22). F&G gate OPEN, Stablecoin supply gate LOCKED ($261.1B vs $261.5B threshold). Confirmed by Krypto 2026-03-07.

agents.name: Key
agents.strategy_summary: Multi-bot directional strategy — trend-following (BTC), mean-reversion (ETH), volume breakout (SOL)
agents.data_notes: Confirmed by Key — 2026-03-04 11:00 GMT. Week 4 data pending — last update was Week 3 (Day 15). Includes mark-to-market for 3 open BTC longs at $71,248 avg.

bots.name: BTC Trend
bots.strategy: EMA9/EMA21 crossover trend-following with bear/short mode + MACD + volume confirmation
bots.notes: Week 3 (last confirmed): 3 open longs at avg $71,248. TP $74,821, SL $69,830. BTC now at $67,908 — positions at risk of stop loss. Week 4 update pending from Key.

bots.name: ETH Mean-Reversion
bots.strategy: Dual-timeframe RSI mean-reversion — 15M entry + 1H trend filter (V3.2)
bots.notes: 584 cycles, 0 trades through Week 3. ETH trending up — no oversold readings. 1H RSI ~62 (armed). Week 4 update pending.

bots.name: SOL Breakout
bots.strategy: Volume-confirmed breakout (V1.3) — trailing stop + volume dry-up exit
bots.notes: Week 3: SOL breakout above $84.88 (3.25× avg volume). +$1.15 in 16 min. SOL now $90.33. 100% win rate (12/12). Week 4 update pending.
